subject: Free Audiobook + Book Launch Event
body:
Thousands of people have already registered to win prizes just for bringing friends.

Here's why: the prizes are sick + many of them were going to come with friends, tell their audiences or teams to come anyways.

So you might as well get more awesome stuff. Here's a sneak peak at just some of the prizes…

- All the behind the scenes breakdowns of how the launch is going: winners, the best content & ads, the numbers, as we countdown to the big day (anyone who registers to refer gets this for free).

- 70 Profit Tactics Audiobook (these are sick)

- Chance to win one of the 50 spots at my headquarters for a day here in Vegas with me answering whatever questions you want*.

- Recording of that day (no matter if you get picked or not).

…and #2,3,4 are just the prizes for getting 10 humans to register.

If you're in the top 50 or top 10…the prizes get WAY better.

PS - I didn't even mention the biggest prize of all… click here to find out what it is.
